overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dimly lit underground casino with neon-lit roulette tables. The player navigates through scattered gamblers and casino staff, eventually ascending a stairwell toward a guarded door at the rear of the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground casino main floor with roulette tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the casino floor, navigating between glowing roulette tables and scattered patrons

notable_agents.action: dealer operating the roulette table, interacting with players

entered.detail: curved gaming table with teal and orange neon edge lighting
central roulette table surrounded by standing players
illuminated gaming table with glowing betting surface
large structural column with purple uplighting
wall with Asian character graffiti and red paint

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a spacious underground casino illuminated by vibrant teal and purple neon lights. Multiple roulette tables with glowing edges occupy the floor, surrounded by standing patrons and dealers. The concrete walls and industrial pillars create a gritty cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: camera passes close to a roulette table on the left, moving toward the back wall
exiting the main casino floor into a narrower corridor leading to stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the back of the casino, moving past the last gaming tables toward a stairwell

entered.detail: concrete ramp leading upward to a door
screen displaying video content on the left wall
metal door with green exit sign above at the top of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the central gaming area toward the rear of the casino where the crowd thins out. A concrete ramp and stairwell become visible ahead, leading to an upper level. The neon lighting gives way to more utilitarian illumination near the back wall.

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete stairs toward the upper level door
approaching a guarded door where an armed NPC stands watch

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs toward a metal door, preparing to interact with the guard

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing by the door, holding a rifle and blocking the entrance

entered.detail: NPC with tattooed arms wearing tactical gear and holding a firearm
teal-colored metal door with horizontal handle and STAFF signage above
metal handrail along the left side of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a narrow concrete stairwell away from the casino floor. The environment becomes more industrial and enclosed. At the top of the stairs, a heavily armed guard stands before a metal door marked with signage, creating a tense atmosphere as the player approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant underground casino that gradually transitions into a stark, industrial security checkpoint. It begins by gliding through a spacious gaming floor illuminated by teal and purple neon lights, passing glowing roulette tables and crowds of patrons amidst gritty concrete pillars. As the camera moves past the central gaming area, the crowd thins and the vivid neon glow gives way to utilitarian lighting near the rear of the establishment. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a narrow concrete stairwell, leaving the casino floor behind for a more enclosed and industrial environment. Finally, the movement culminates at the top of the stairs, approaching a heavily armed guard stationed before a marked metal door.
